business.type_label: sommelier services firm (private/corporate wine & whiskey tasting events, wine consulting, wine evaluation)
business.geography_hint: USA nationwide + international cities (New York, Miami, Chicago, Dallas, LA, Las Vegas, London, Singapore, Hong Kong, Shanghai)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Sells defined expertise — credentialed sommeliers (MW/MS/CWE/DipWSET), an advisory board, and 'The Authority on Wine' positioning; the visitor is deciding whether to trust this firm/its experts to run their event, not evaluating a packaged product or browsing a gallery.

goal.one_action: get the visitor to request a quote / contact the company to hire sommelier services for an event

structure.archetype_note: Squarespace multi-page authority site with a large network of SEO-targeted city landing pages; core nav is service-by-service (events, consulting, scoring) funneling to an instant-quote tool and a contact form.

mapped.observed_as: Your Nationwide Resource for Wine Expertise and Sommelier-Guided Private Tasting Events
Sommelier-Guided Wine and Whiskey Tasting Events / Independent Wine Evaluation / Wine Consulting Assignments
We have been featured in... / Recent corporate event clients
Overview of Wine & Whiskey Event Tasting Formats (5 formats: seminars, tasting stations, pairing dinners, team building, country excursions)
We have teams of experts in every major population center (coverage map)
Click Here to Visualize Your Event and CREATE an instant quote

unmapped.observed: Event Quote Visualizer (interactive instant-quote tool that produces a per-event price estimate)
unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical section represents a live quote/price configurator; it computes a user-specific output rather than displaying static pricing
Recruiting content is a secondary audience not covered by conversion-oriented section ids

proposed_new.name: interactive-calculators
proposed_new.evidence: The 'Event Quote Visualizer' / 'Instant Quote' tool builds a user-specific event price estimate — a live computational tool, not a static pricing section (did not hydrate in render, treated as unverified).

proposed_new.name: geo-landing-network
proposed_new.evidence: Site nav exposes ~40 city-specific SEO landing pages plus ~15 international city pages — a programmatic near-duplicate geo-targeted landing-page network, distinct from generic multipage/multi-location profiles.

confidence.why: fetch_quality is 'rendered' not 'full'; the instant-quote tool never hydrated, contact form fields are behind an un-clicked popup, and pricing exists only in un-captured PDFs — key conversion mechanics are inferred, not verified.

gap_findings: A programmatic geo-landing-page network (~55 city pages) has no representation in the capability vocab — Lessgo assumes a single conversion site, not an SEO page fleet.
Instant-quote / event-cost configurator tool cannot be expressed by any section id or capability (interactive-calculators proposed).
Pricing delivered as downloadable PDFs (WineTastingPricing.pdf etc.) rather than an on-page pricing section — no canonical pattern for gated/downloadable price sheets.
Advisory-board / credentialed-team-as-proof pattern maps awkwardly to socialProof; a dedicated credentialed-team proof section would fit better.
